impact: This gives the daemon a deterministic recovery path after repeated malformed Python proposals: keep the active domain task paused, avoid broad fixture rewrites, require py_compile-first syntax validity, and resume only with a tiny fixture-first retry. It improves autonomous progress by changing retry selection and diagnostics instead of implementing the stalled PP&D domain task directly.
summary: Strengthen supervisor repair guidance for the repeated public-PDF syntax-preflight loop.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 9 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
